## Purpose

Describe the reader problem and exact scope.

## Content type

- [ ] Formal chapter
- [ ] Community case
- [ ] Template
- [ ] Correction
- [ ] Site code

## Evidence and safety

- [ ] Claims link to authorized or official evidence.
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, or unauthorized material are included.
- [ ] Product behavior is verified or marked “以当前官方版本为准”.
- [ ] External actions have human confirmation points.
- [ ] Third-party materials declare their license.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run validate:content`
- [ ] `npm run docs:build`
- [ ] Keyboard, narrow-screen, light, and dark mode spot checks
